_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibitors Lead to PDGFR Pathway Upregulation and Sensitize Tumors to RAF Dimer Inhibitors in NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor.

_contextSnippet: Body weight measurements of SCID mice treated with vehicle, binimetinib, ripretinib, or the combination
details: Body weight measurements showed tolerability of combination treatments
